message:
fix: Commit() excludes config table to prevent issue_prefix corruption (GH#2455)

DOLT_COMMIT('-Am') stages ALL dirty tables, sweeping up stale config
changes from concurrent operations. Replace with selective staging that
queries dolt_status and skips the config table. Add CommitWithConfig()
for callers that intentionally modify config (bd dolt commit).

Also fix RunMigrations(), FK migration, and merge conflict resolution
to use explicit DOLT_ADD instead of -Am.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
